categories.title: Command Code

skills.purpose: Prefer indexed lookup and focused CLI actions before broad file scans or large refactors.

skills.title: Grant Search
skills.purpose: Discover, qualify, and track grant opportunities without skipping approval gates.

categories.title: Graph Logic

skills.title: Graph Logic

categories.title: Self Learning
